reason: Global project invariants: RVV-first typed body authority, no descriptor/source-front-door/common-EmitC semantic authority.
RVV selected-body owner registry, segment2 selected-body realization, provider planning, fail-closed, mirror metadata, and target artifact contracts.
tcrv.exec envelope and ABI/runtime role boundary; compute and RVV semantics stay plugin-owned.
TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute and neutral common EmitC route contract; no common RVV semantic inference.
Previous owner extraction pattern and validation expectations for moving selected-body realization out of the central file.
